summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Ranjana Yoga Studio 4th hero iteration. New features including faded 'Balance' background text, gold decorative elements, and updated headline are working correctly. All major functionality verified successfully.

ui_bugs.issue: Element stability issues when clicking - animation interference prevents reliable clicking

passed_tests: Homepage hero loads with centered AI-generated yoga figure on rich ivory background with decorative elements
Large faded 'Balance' text visible in background behind the figure (visually confirmed in screenshot)
Decorative gold circle outlines visible in the background (4 circular elements found)
Hero headline 'Inner Peace Starts Here.' visible at bottom-left with 'Peace' in rose italic color
Hero CTA buttons 'get started' and 'view classes' are clickable and navigate correctly to /contact and /services
Social icons (Instagram and WhatsApp) visible at bottom-left
3-layer parallax effect works on scroll with different layer speeds
Navigation works correctly for all 6 pages (Home, About, Services, Schedule, Gallery, Contact)
All homepage sections render correctly: Stats, Services Overview, Weight Loss, Why Us, Testimonials, CTA Banner, Gallery Strip
Mobile hamburger menu opens and closes correctly
Navbar context-aware behavior works (transparent on hero, solid on scroll)
Rich visual background with atmospheric gradient blobs and decorative elements
Yoga figure properly centered and blended with ivory background using inset box-shadow
